title: [phase:critique] [family:backend-fit] [provider_hint:codex] Review suitability of the Google AI agents technical guidance for using Google agent tooling as the backend layer for Cursorvers.Inc. Focus on risks, lock-in, security, and what should not be delegated to agents. Findings first.
summary_text: 1. **Critical regression risk: don’t hook `runCursorversOrchestrator` directly into `line-webhook` yet.** `runCursorversOrchestrator` skips risk/polish unless the text matches a course keyword ([cursorvers-orchestrator.ts:36](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/_shared/cursorvers-orchestrator.ts:36), [cursorvers-orchestrator.ts:39](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/_shared/cursorvers-orchestrator.ts:39)). But `line-webhook` expects free-form `polish:` / `check:` inputs ([index.ts:944](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:944), [index.ts:949](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:949), [index.ts:871](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:871)). 2. **High: wrapper failure contract differs from current handlers.** Handlers read `result.error` ([index.ts:722](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:722), [index.ts:798](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:798)), while wrappers return `userError` on failure ([cursorvers-wrapper-facade.ts:41](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/_shared/cursorvers-wrapper-facade.ts:41), [cursorvers-wrapper-facade.ts:65](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/_shared/cursorvers-wrapper-facade.ts:65)). 3. **High: `RiskChecker` path already has message integrity risk.** `risk-checker` already appends Discord footer ([risk-checker.ts:396](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/lib/risk-checker.ts:396)), and handler appends another footer ([index.ts:794](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:794)). `pushText` has no length clamp ([line-api.ts:99](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/lib/line-api.ts:99), [line-api.ts:112](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/lib/line-api.ts:112)). 4. **Medium: input-limit policy mismatch can cause unexpected rejects.** `line-webhook` uses env-based `MAX_INPUT_LENGTH` ([index.ts:125](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:125)), but wrapper validators hard-cap at 3000 ([cursorvers-wrapper-validation.ts:43](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/_shared/cursorvers-wrapper-validation.ts:43), [cursorvers-wrapper-validation.ts:55](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/_shared/cursorvers-wrapper-validation.ts:55)). 5. **Medium: wrapper/orchestrator tests are not deployment-realistic yet.** `_shared` tests fail without Supabase env because imports pull side-effectful client creation ([supabase.ts:22](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/_shared/supabase.ts:22), [cursorvers-wrapper-facade.ts:1](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/_shared/cursorvers-wrapper-facade.ts:1), [user-state.ts:6](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/lib/user-state.ts:6)). `line-webhook` lib tests passed (`19 passed, 2 ignored`), but index-level hookup tests are missing. **Recommendation (safest minimal real-caller hookup):** Route **`handlePromptPolisher` first**, not `handleRiskChecker`, and do it via **`runPromptPolisherWrapper` only** (not full orchestrator). Reason: lower safety blast radius, simpler output path, and `RiskChecker` currently has unresolved output-size/footer duplication risk. **Policy note:** this was a single-Codex lane review; per your orchestration policy, final adjudication still needs parallel non-Codex lanes.
